message.content:
@startuml
title UML Diagram: Class VariableRelationship in Context
note "Hints\n- Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.\n- Click on a name to go to the corresponding page." as hints
class "Conceptual::\nVariableRelationship" as VariableRelationship {
  identifier : Identifier
  semantics : ControlledVocabularyEntry
}
class "Conceptual::\nConceptualVariable" as ConceptualVariable
class "Conceptual::\nVariableStructure" as VariableStructure
class "CollectionsPattern::\nMemberRelationship" as MemberRelationship
VariableRelationship --> ConceptualVariable : hasSource
VariableRelationship --> ConceptualVariable : hasTarget
VariableStructure --> VariableRelationship : has
VariableRelationship ..> MemberRelationship : «Refine»
footer "DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 - Conceptual::VariableRelationship"
@enduml
